title: Set up app shell navigation and layout
description: Create top-level page structure, route placeholders, and shared layout components for Telemap.

title: Implement binary image storage strategy for floor PNG files
description: Persist uploaded floor PNG files in browser storage and map them to floor records via stable image IDs.
design: Prefer IndexedDB (Blob) for images and keep only metadata/index pointers in localStorage to avoid quota fragmentation.

title: Add schema migration and data validation pipeline
description: Build startup checks that validate stored data and migrate older schema versions safely with rollback logging.
design: Create idempotent migration steps keyed by semantic version and store migration audit trail.

title: Define versioned domain schema for site hierarchy and assets
description: Specify TypeScript-first schema for Site -> Building -> Floor -> Room -> Asset graph, including IDs, timestamps, parent relations, and required/optional fields.
design: Use discriminated unions for asset types and media properties. Add schemaVersion at root and per floor document when needed to support partial migrations.

title: Build site/building/floor creation flows
description: Implement forms/actions to create new sites, add buildings under a site, and add floors under a building with validation and optimistic UI updates.

title: Implement hierarchical navigation tree for infrastructure
description: Create left-side tree view for sites -> buildings -> floors with expand/collapse, selection state, and contextual actions.
design: Use virtualized rendering or incremental expansion strategy so large datasets remain responsive.

title: Add rename, move, and delete safeguards in hierarchy
description: Support editing and deletion actions for site/building/floor entities with confirmation prompts and referential integrity checks.

title: Persist UI navigation state and selection context
description: Persist currently selected site/building/floor and tree expansion state across page reloads.

title: Implement PNG upload flow with client validation
description: Allow users to upload floor layout PNG files, validate MIME type and file size, and show upload feedback/errors.

title: Render persisted floor images in canvas viewport
description: Load floor image from browser storage and render in canvas with pan/zoom controls for layout inspection.

title: Add floor image transform controls
description: Provide manipulation controls for rotate, uniform scale, non-uniform stretch, and reset-to-original transform on floor images.
design: Store transform matrix per floor instead of only derived values to keep operations composable and reversible.

title: Implement AI task command panel UI
description: Build an interface for creating and tracking AI-generated work items that sync to Beads issue IDs.

title: Implement scale calibration from two picked points
description: Enable user to click two points on floor plan, enter real-world distance + unit, and compute pixels-per-unit calibration for measurement-aware features.
design: Capture calibration as immutable measurement record linked to floor revision so recalibration history is preserved.

title: Add undo/redo stack for canvas editing commands
description: Implement command-history based undo/redo for image transforms and calibration interactions.

title: Define room geometry and metadata model
description: Model rooms on a floor with geometry reference (initially rectangles or polygons) and metadata such as room name/code.

title: Implement room CRUD and map placement workflow
description: Allow users to create/edit/delete rooms on a floor and visually place room boundaries on the layout canvas.

title: Model telecom endpoint and rack asset hierarchy
description: Implement Room asset model supporting Rack and Station Drop, and nested rack items Patch Panel, Switch, Router.

title: Add extensible media and strand property schema
description: Define reusable property schema for strand count, media type (fiber/copper), and future vendor/model-specific attributes.
design: Use key-typed custom properties with validation descriptors so new equipment fields can be added without schema breakage.

title: Build asset forms and inline validation UX
description: Create focused forms/editors for rack items and station drops with consistent validation and quick-edit behavior.

title: Define architecture decision records for storage and canvas engine
description: Capture ADRs for IndexedDB vs localStorage responsibilities, state management approach, and canvas interaction architecture.
design: Suggested improvement: use an event-sourced command bus for canvas edits to simplify undo/redo and future multi-user sync.

title: Implement backup and restore for local project data
description: Provide export/import flow for full site dataset and image binaries to protect against browser storage loss.

title: Add quota monitoring and graceful storage failure UX
description: Detect low-storage situations, surface clear errors, and provide user actions (cleanup/export) when writes fail.

title: Define map interaction module contract
description: Document and implement JS module boundaries for map rendering, viewport state, and event handling.

title: Create test plan for model integrity and canvas interactions
description: Define and implement tests for entity validation, dependency integrity, image persistence, calibration math, and transform behavior.

title: Data model and local persistence architecture
description: Design normalized domain model for sites/buildings/floors/rooms/assets and implement versioned local persistence with migration support.
design: Use a versioned schema and an append-only revision log for edits where practical. Keep image blobs separate from metadata records to avoid expensive full-object writes in localStorage; prefer IndexedDB for binary payloads with localStorage as small-cache/index only.

title: Room and telecom inventory domain workflows
description: Model rooms and telecom assets (racks, station drops, rack equipment) with extensible typed properties for strand count and media type.

title: Site/building/floor workflows and navigation tree
description: Implement user flows to add and browse sites, buildings, and floors with an efficient left-side tree navigation experience.

title: Floor image upload and canvas interaction system
description: Support PNG upload, persisted client-side storage, floor-plan rendering in canvas, and direct manipulation tools including transform and scale calibration.

title: MVP foundation for telecom documentation utility
description: Deliver a first end-to-end release with local-only persistence, floor-plan visualization, and hierarchical infrastructure data management.

title: Implement client-side repository layer for metadata records
description: Create storage service abstractions for CRUD operations on sites/buildings/floors/rooms/assets metadata, isolated from UI components.
design: Expose async repository APIs even for local operations to keep migration path to remote sync simple.
